candidate_definition_hints.text: An abstract kernel implementation for Jupyter kernels running on the Java virtual machine.

This project is a Java implementation of the [Jupyter kernel messaging spec](http://jupyter-client.readthedocs.io/en/latest/messaging.html). Consumers of this project need to simply extend the `BaseKernel` and implement the things specific to the language that the kernel is work…
